title: Transgender Hormone Therapy - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Transgender Hormone Therapy 22 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness LEGACY HEALTH RANDALL CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL AT LEGACY EMANUEL RANDALL CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Comprehensive medical center for children. Also offers a clinic that provides medical treatment and mental health support for gender non-conforming youth. 2801 N Gantenbein Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 276-6500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOWER COLUMBIA Q CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources and support services to the LGBTQ2SIA+ community and allies of the Lower Columbia region. Services include a community center, education opportunities, mentorship, and monthly support groups for adults, youth, and families. Limited financial assistance is available as funds allow for gender-affirming costs, name changes, hormone treatments, and other expenses approved on a case-by-case basis. Financial assistance is limited to once per year, with a $200 limit. 171 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Community Center walk in hours: Tuesday 2pm-5pm, Thursday noon-4pm. Other hours vary by service. Email (503) 468-5155 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL UNIVERSITY OF NATURAL MEDICINE NUNM HEALTH CENTER LAIR HILL TRANS HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community clinic using naturopathic practices. Doctors are prepared to support those in transition with ongoing general care, including hormone therapy. 3025 S Corbett Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as transgender or non-binary Hours: Monday 10:30am-5:30pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm, Friday 11:30pm-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-12:30pm (503) 552-1551 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT TRANSGENDER HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical services for people seeking gender transition-related care. Services include education and preparation for transgender medical services, clinician referrals, and specialized information and referral for transgender issues. Medical services provided include hormone therapy, fertility services, laser hair removal, and surgeries for face, chest, and sexual organs. Also offers education, training, and advocacy for transgender health issues within the OHSU community. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Age 18 and older seeking gender transition-related care Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 494-7970 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH HOOD RIVER CLINIC LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of services specifically for the LGBTQ2+ community, including gender-affirming care (initiation and maintenance of hormone therapy and referrals to gender-affirming care specialists), behavioral health providers with specialized training in LGBTQ2+ care, assistance with legal ID changes through the county, DMV, and passports, reproductive health care and STI screening. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Varies by service, established One Community Health patients only Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm On-call provider and SOUTHWESTERN OREGON CENTER EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of sexual and reproductive health care services, including birth control, emergency contraception (morning after pill), annual gynecological exams, PAP tests, colposcopy and LEEP procedures, breast exams, LGBTQ2+ services, Gender Affirming Hormone Therapy (GAHT), sexually transmitted disease (STD) testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, pregnancy testing and options information. Provides a medication based abortion (up to 10 weeks) and surgical abortion (up to 13 weeks + 6 days). 3579 Franklin Boulevard Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Varies by service. HPV immunizations available for age 18 and younger. Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9:30am-6pm, Thursday 10:30am-6pm, Friday 8am-4pm (541) 344-9411 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE OREGON CLINIC OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY EAST OB/GYN HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of women's reproductive and sexual health care services, including annual gynecological exams, prenatal care, contraception, birth control counseling, and STD/HIV treatment. 5050 NE Hoyt Street Suite 362 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Adolescent and adult females Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 10am-3pm (503) 239-6800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE OREGON CLINIC OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY NORTH OB/GYN HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of women's reproductive and sexual health care services, including annual gynecological exams, prenatal care, contraception, birth control counseling, and STD/HIV treatment. 501 N Graham Street Suite 550 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Adolescent and adult females Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 10am-3pm (503) 284-5220 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE WELLNESS AND QUEER MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gender-affirming healthcare and health education to queer, transgender, and intersex communities. Services include hormone therapy, electrolysis, and body image resurces, as well as assistance with name and indentification changes. 1590 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 357-7594 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSPONDER HIV ALLIANCE INJECTION SUPPLY DELIVERY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a no contact delivery service for hormone injection supplies. 440 Maxwell Road Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Low income individuals or those with transportation issues Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 321-0872 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S CARE THE FERTILITY CENTER OF OREGON FERTILITY CENTER OF OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps people with their reproductive health and family planning. Provide womens check ups, hormone help, and IVF treatment. Offers male health and fertility services. Provide Medical and surgical care to LGBTQ2+ community. 590 Country Coub Parkway Suite A Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Saturday-Sunday 7am-10:30am (541) 683-1559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON ASHLAND WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Gynecological care. Services include pap tests, menopause counseling and therapy, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, fertility evaluation and treatment and pregnancy testing. Transgender hormone therapy, STD counseling and treatment, contraceptives and genetic counseling services offered. Does not offer obstetric services. 595 N Main Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Obstetric and Gynecological care. Services include contraceptives, menopause counseling and therapy, STD counseling and treatment, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, family planning, mother and infant care. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEGACY HEALTH RANDALL CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL LOWER COLUMBIA Q CENTER LOWER COLUMBIA Q CENTER NATIONAL UNIVERSITY OF NATURAL MEDICINE TRANS HEALTH OHSU TRANSGENDER HEALTH PROGRAM ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE OUTSIDE IN TRANS CLINIC OUTSIDE IN TRANS CLINIC PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES THE OREGON CLINIC OB/GYN HEALTH SERVICES THE OREGON CLINIC OB/GYN HEALTH SERVICES TRANSITION HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE WELLNESS AND QUEER MEDICINE TRANSPONDER HIV ALLIANCE INJECTION SUPPLY DELIVERY PROGRAM WOMEN'S CARE FERTILITY CENTER OF OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES
